title: Create Foundation/StyleParserTest.php covering all edge cases
acceptance_criteria: Plain text without markers parses to Cell array with defaultStyle
Nested [[x]] preserves inner content with nested style
Malformed [(  missing closing bracket produces raw text
Empty string input returns empty array
Unknown color name is silently ignored (uses default)
Multiple tokens in one bracket fg:red,bold work together
Style reverts to previous after closing ]
